supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 0 profitable and 9 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -112.85, and worst fold rw_005 net PnL -20.66.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution differed from closed-bar logic by 25.46 total net PnL across 9 better and 0 worse folds; closeout remains bounded to fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0112 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or micro-consolidation-breakout-continuation feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday micro consolidation breakout continuation rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0112 R0001 tests whether an intraday directional impulse followed by a short micro-consolidation digestion window can retain enough range, absorb adverse overlap, cool participation, hold settlement and VWAP context, and then continue through a breakout surface after realistic FPMarkets US100 spread cost. It changes feature family, label conditioning, model context, and trade-logic state key from C0111 cost efficient drift continuation, C0110 extreme retest failure reversal, C0109 failed VWAP reversion continuation, C0099 failed pullback continuation, and C0090 volatility-regime break compression release. It is not a threshold/window/SL/TP/session/spread/capital nudge, materialization step, ONNX step, selected claim, runtime claim, or retry-only run.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: No C0111 drift thresholds, C0090 compression thresholds, C0099 pullback gates, C0109 VWAP reversion gates, stops, targets, sessions, spread caps, or capital sizing changes are used as the run question.

surface_distance_rationale.feature: Impulse, digestion, retention, adverse-overlap, dwell, touch-density, and VWAP-hold features replace C0111 quiet drift and cost-efficiency features.
surface_distance_rationale.label: Target-first quality after micro-consolidation breakout continuation, not cost-efficient drift continuation or failed-reversion continuation.
surface_distance_rationale.model: Fold-local linear intraday micro-consolidation breakout continuation rank.
surface_distance_rationale.trade_logic: Continuation-direction top fold-local micro-consolidation-breakout-continuation scores per active day.

pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: New major campaign surface asks whether impulse digestion and level retention can produce portable continuation entries after paired MT5 validation.
